zh.lifeSummary: 當Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton於1311年11月1日出生在英國賀福爾維爾頓時，他的父親Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton29歲，母親Anne Rockley22歲。他於1328年1月10日之前與Maud de Botetourt結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1370年5月28日在英國德比夏爾藍德享年58歲，埋葬在英國。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton于1311年11月1日出生在英国賀福爾維爾頓时，他的父亲Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton29岁，母亲Anne Rockley22岁。他于1328年1月10日之前与Maud de Botetourt结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1370年5月28日在英国德比夏爾藍德享年58岁，埋葬在英国。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Grey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: variant of   Gray  .
In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Ukrainian Grushko: nickname or topographic name derived from a Russian-influenced transliteration of grushka ‘pear, pear tree’.

variants.name: Gray
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish (especially Eastern Ulster; of Norman origin): habitational name from Graye in Calvados, France, named from the Gallo-Roman personal name Graec(i)us, meaning ‘Greek’ + the locative suffix -acum. This is probably the chief source of the surname in Britain.

English: nickname for someone with gray hair or a gray beard, from Middle English grey (Old English grǣg, grēg) ‘gray’. In Ireland it has been used as a translation of various Gaelic surnames derived from riabhach ‘brindled, gray’, including Mac Giolla Riabhaigh; see McGreevy . In North America, this surname has assimilated names with similar meaning from other languages.
French: habitational name from Gray in Haute-Saône or Le Gray in Seine-Maritime.

variants.name: Greiwe
meanings: German: possibly a nickname from Middle High German greibe ‘sharp, tangy, dour’. Compare Grey .

nameMeanings.name: Reynold
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Reinald, Reynaud, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ragin ‘advice, decision’ + wald ‘ruler’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them into England. In modern use, the given name sometimes represents a transferred use of the surname derived from the Norman personal name.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton was born on 1 November 1311, in Wilton, Herefordshire, England, his father, Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton, was 29 and his mother, Anne Rockley, was 22. He married Maud de Botetourt before 10 January 1328. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 28 May 1370, in Shirland, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton est né le 1 novembre 1311, à Wilton, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Anne Rockley, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Maud de Botetourt avant 10 janvier 1328. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 28 mai 1370, à Shirland, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton am 1. November 1311 in Wilton, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton 29 und seine Mutter Anne Rockley 22. Er hat vor 10. Januar 1328 Maud de Botetourt geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 28. Mai 1370 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Shirland, Derbyshire, England und wurde in England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton è nato il il 1 novembre 1311 nel Wilton, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Anne Rockley, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Maud de Botetourt prima del 10 gennaio 1328. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 28 maggio 1370, nel Shirland, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a England.

ja.lifeSummary: Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wiltonが1311年11月1日にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウィルトンで生まれた時，父Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wiltonは29歳，母Anne Rockleyは22歳であった。1328年1月10日以前にMaud de Botetourtと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1370年5月28日にイギリスデルブイシュアイアシュイルランドで58歳で死去し，イギリスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton(이)가 1311년 11월 1일 영국 허퍼드실르 윌턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Rockley(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1328년 1월 10일 이전 Maud de Botetourt(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1370년 5월 28일 영국 더비실르 실를랜드에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국에 묻혔다.

pt.1 November 1311–28 May 1370: 1 de novembro de 1311–28 de maio de 1370
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1311, em Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Anne Rockley, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Maud de Botetourt antes 10 de janeiro de 1328. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 28 de maio de 1370, em Shirland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton родился 1 ноября 1311 г. в местности уилтон, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Rockley, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Maud de Botetourt перед 10 январь 1328 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 28 мая 1370 г. в местности ширланд, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности Англия.

es.1 November 1311–28 May 1370: 1 de noviembre de 1311–28 de mayo de 1370
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reynold de Grey 4th Baron Grey of Wilton nació el 1 de noviembre de 1311, en Wilton, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Henry DeGREY , 3rd Baron Grey de Wilton, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Anne Rockley, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Maud de Botetourt antes de 10 de enero de 1328. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 28 de mayo de 1370, en Shirland, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Inglaterra.
